prompt: 添加新故事: US-099 是新创建的故事 (To Do)，将其添加到 UPM requirements 章节

assertions.name: adds_story_to_upm
assertions.description: Should add US-099 as a new entry in UPM requirements

assertions.name: sets_initial_status
assertions.description: Should set the initial status to To Do in UPM

assertions.name: preserves_existing_entries
assertions.description: Should not modify existing UPM entries during addition
